findings.title: API smoke failed for /protected/payments/student-summary?studentId=c98d3184-2060-4a80-9c77-0657a928b7dd
findings.expected: Idempotent GET endpoint should return a 2xx response for the documented smoke request.
findings.actual: HTTP 400: {"error":"Student and payment date are required."}
findings.risk: Client-side data loaders or smoke probes may fail against the live deployment.

findings.title: Import dry-run workflow failed during special smoke
findings.expected: Template download, upload, and dry-run validation complete without committing rows.
findings.actual:
locator.click: Timeout 15000ms exceeded.
Call log:
[2m  - waiting for getByRole('button', { name: /check rows|dry-run|validate/i }).first()[22m
[2m    - locator resolved to <button disabled type="submit" class="relative inline-flex items-center justify-center gap-2 whitespace-nowrap rounded-md text-sm font-medium transition-[background-color,border-color,color,box-shadow,transform] duration-150 ease-out focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-ring focus-visible:ring-offset-2 focus-visible:ring-offset-background disabled:pointer-events-none disabled:opacity-60 [&_svg]:pointer-events-none [&_svg]:size-4 [&_svg]:shrink-0 active:translate-y-[0.5px]…>Re-check rows</button>[22m
[2m  - attempting click action[22m
[2m    2 × waiting for element to be visible, enabled and stable[22m
[2m      - element is not enabled[22m

[2m    - waiting 20ms[22m
[2m    2 × waiting for element to be visible, enabled and stable[22m
[2m      - element is not enabled[22m
[2m    - retrying click action[22m

[2m    27 × waiting for element to be visible, enabled and stable[22m

findings.title: Payment Desk TEST write-path failed during special smoke
findings.expected: A ₹100 Cash payment can be posted only for a TEST-prefixed student in TEST-2026-27.
findings.actual:
locator.click: Error: strict mode violation: getByRole('button', { name: /review receipt/i }) resolved to 2 elements:
    1) <button type="button" class="relative inline-flex items-center justify-center gap-2 whitespace-nowrap rounded-md transition-[background-color,border-color,color,box-shadow,transform] duration-150 ease-out focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-ring focus-visible:ring-offset-2 focus-visible:ring-offset-background disabled:pointer-events-none disabled:opacity-60 [&_svg]:pointer-events-none [&_svg]:size-4 [&_svg]:shrink-0 active:translate-y-[0.5px] bg-accent text-accent-foregr…>Review Receipt · ₹100</button> aka getByRole('button', { name: 'Review Receipt · ₹' })
    2) <button type="button" class="relative inline-flex items-center justify-center gap-2 whitespace-nowrap rounded-md text-sm font-medium transition-[background-color,border-color,color,box-shadow,transform] duration-150 ease-out focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-ring focus-visible:ring-offset-2 focus-visible:ring-offset-background disabled:pointer-events-none disabled:opacity-60 [&_svg]:pointer-events-none [&_svg]:size-4 [&_svg]:shrink-0 active:translate-y-[0.5px] bg-prima…>Review Receipt</button> aka getByRole('button', { name: 'Review Receipt', exact: true })

Call log:
[2m  - waiting for getByRole('button', { name: /review receipt/i })[22m
findings.risk: The cashier critical path is not proven safe.

findings.title: Payment confirmation modal does not close with ESC
findings.expected: ESC closes the topmost payment confirmation overlay.
findings.actual: The Confirm & Save Payment modal stayed open after ESC.
findings.risk: Keyboard users must find the Back / Edit control to recover from preview.
